question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a LOG opcode emitting an event with sensitive indexed parameters, causing the opcode replay to expose the full event data including topics and data fields that may contain sensitive information not visible in the standard transaction receipt?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a KECCAK256 opcode hashing sensitive data, causing the opcode replay with `stack=true&memory=true` to expose the pre-image of the hash (the sensitive data before hashing) from the EVM memory dump?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALLDATALOAD opcode, causing the opcode replay with `stack=true` to expose the exact calldata bytes passed to the contract function, revealing function arguments that may contain sensitive parameters such as amounts, addresses, or private identifiers?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a RETURNDATALOAD opcode, causing the opcode replay with `stack=true&memory=true` to expose the return data from an internal call, leaking the response of a sensitive sub-call that was not intended to be publicly visible?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a SELFDESTRUCT opcode, causing the opcode replay to expose the beneficiary address and the exact balance transferred during the self-destruct, leaking financial information about the contract's final state?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a BALANCE opcode querying another account's balance, causing the opcode replay with `stack=true` to expose the exact balance of that account at the time of the original transaction, leaking historical financial data?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a EXTCODECOPY opcode, causing the opcode replay with `memory=true` to expose the bytecode of an external contract that was copied into memory during the original transaction, leaking proprietary contract logic?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a SSTORE opcode writing sensitive data to contract storage, causing the opcode replay with `storage=true` to expose the exact key-value pairs written to storage, leaking sensitive contract state changes that were part of the original transaction?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALL to a Hedera precompile (e.g., HTS token operations), causing the opcode replay to expose the full parameters of the precompile call including token IDs, amounts, and account addresses that were part of the original transaction?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALL to a contract implementing a commit-reveal scheme, causing the opcode replay with `stack=true&memory=true` to expose the revealed secret before it was publicly committed, breaking the confidentiality of the commit-reveal protocol?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALL to a contract implementing a sealed-bid auction, causing the opcode replay with `stack=true&memory=true` to expose the bid amount that was encrypted or hidden in the original transaction, breaking auction confidentiality?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALL to a contract implementing a zero-knowledge proof verifier, causing the opcode replay with `stack=true&memory=true` to expose the witness data (private inputs) that were passed to the verifier, breaking the zero-knowledge property?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALL to a contract implementing a multi-signature wallet, causing the opcode replay with `stack=true` to expose the individual signatures and signers that were part of the multi-sig execution, leaking the identity of the signers?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALL to a contract implementing a flash loan, causing the opcode replay to expose the exact loan amount, recipient, and callback data, leaking the financial details of the flash loan operation?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALL to a contract implementing an AMM (automated market maker), causing the opcode replay with `storage=true` to expose the exact reserve values and price impact of the swap, leaking MEV-sensitive trading information?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALL to a contract implementing an oracle, causing the opcode replay with `stack=true` to expose the exact oracle price data that was consumed during the original transaction, leaking sensitive price feed information?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALL to a contract implementing a governance vote, causing the opcode replay with `stack=true&storage=true` to expose the exact vote weight and voting address, leaking the identity and voting power of the voter?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/OpcodesController.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getContractOpcodes()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `transactionIdOrHash` for a transaction that involved a CALL to a contract implementing a lending protocol, causing the opcode replay with `storage=true` to expose the exact collateral ratio and liquidation threshold of a borrower's position, leaking sensitive financial data?
